differentials.name: Others: caruncle, urethral mucosal prolapse, inflammatory tags
differentials.raw: Others: caruncle, urethral mucosal prolapse, inflammatory tags (in female)

context: Age:   older patient Location:   in prostatic / bulbomembranous urethra ◊  Frequently associated with concomitant bladder papillomas Age:   young men Histo:   columnar epithelium ← aberrant prostatic epithelium Location:   adjacent to verumontanum √  well-defined homogeneous tumor with increased vascularity √  T1-hypointense + T2-hyperintense relative to muscle + uniform enhancement
